name: Computer Vision with Transformers on Amazon SageMaker
impact: Turns a complex transformer architecture into a visual learning path for ML builders.

name: Computer Vision with Transformers on Amazon SageMaker
impact: Provides runnable sample code that developers can inspect, adapt, and extend.

name: Amazon Q Developer Agentic Coding Workshop
impact: Shows developers how AI coding assistants can fit into real development workflows.

name: Rapid Generative AI Application Development with Amazon Bedrock
impact: Helps developers move from foundation model access, including models such as Claude and Llama, to working GenAI application patterns.

name: Foundation Model Prototyping with Amazon Bedrock
impact: Lowers the first-step barrier for Mandarin-speaking developers exploring foundation models such as Claude and Llama through Amazon Bedrock.

name: Building a GenAI Vector Database on AWS Graviton
impact: Teaches vector data infrastructure patterns for retrieval-augmented GenAI systems.

name: Prompt Chaining Workflows with Amazon Bedrock and Step Functions
impact: Demonstrates orchestration patterns for multi-step LLM workflows and agent-like systems.

name: Data as the Differentiation Layer for Generative AI
impact: Frames data quality and retrieval as practical differentiators for GenAI products.

name: AI-Native DevOps for Future-Ready Engineering
impact: Connects AI adoption to developer productivity, automation, and operational excellence.

name: LLMOps for Production Generative AI Applications
impact: Gives developers an operating model for taking GenAI applications beyond prototypes.

name: Training and Serving Large Language Models on Kubernetes
impact: Bridges LLM training and serving with cloud-native deployment practices.

name: Rust for Generative AI Systems and Developer Tooling
impact: Helps developers evaluate systems-language choices for AI tooling and infrastructure.

name: High-Performance Java Workloads on AWS Cloud
impact: Helps backend developers connect cloud performance work to AI application foundations.

name: The Java Ecosystem for Cloud-Native AI on AWS
impact: Positions familiar Java tooling as part of the path to production AI systems.

name: Accelerated ML Inference on AWS Inferentia with AWS Neuron SDK
impact: Guides developers toward cost- and performance-aware inference optimization.

name: Vector Similarity Search with k-NN on Amazon Elasticsearch Service
impact: Explains similarity search foundations used in recommendation, retrieval, and AI search systems.

name: UltraWarm Tiered Storage for Cloud-Scale AI and Log Analytics
impact: Demonstrates scalable data-retention patterns for AI observability and log analytics.

name: Building Production-Grade AI Applications on AWS ML Platforms
impact: Shows how AI applications progress from demos to production-ready architecture.
